finding_results.notes: Each game now carries a readable non-score pivot that changes Anika's tactical behavior: class-pressure chatter redirects game-one tempo, Ravi's withheld signaling forces self-called patterns in game two, agreement-memory enforces depth over flash in game three, shame-triggered self-punishment is refused in game four, and approval-seeking is checked in game five to preserve disciplined shot selection.
The train-car beat now uses explicit quoted profanity ("Fuck") plus immediate embodied consequence (the boy in the Mets cap reacts, then Anika checks Ravi's ankle state).

finding_results.notes: Repetitive emotional-landing diction and binary "It was not... It was..." construction were replaced with scene-specific phrasing and varied syntax while preserving pressure, tone, and causal clarity.

summary: Structural/craft blockers were resolved in-place: match architecture now includes explicit choice-consequence pivots beyond scoreboard churn, sanitization drift at the train beat is removed with concrete language and social effect, and recurring prose templates were line-edited out to restore line-level variance and specificity.
